title: TUI: roadmap view mode (epic chains with status and gates)
description:
Spec: docs/design/execution-model-v2-epic-chaining-and-learning-loop.md §1 (TUI roadmap awareness). Consumes query.Roadmap from internal/query/roadmap.go (merged before this runs; statuses done|active|ready|queued|gated).

Recon facts (verified): internal/tui is Bubbletea; single model in internal/tui/model.go (~1400 lines, two-pane: list tree + detail); data loads via NewModel(filtered ...) and an fsnotify watcher on .tick/issues reloads + buildItems(); styling via internal/tui/styles.go + internal/styles (status styles exist: StatusClosedStyle/StatusOpenStyle/StatusInProgressStyle, IconAwaiting).

Implement a roadmap MODE toggled with the m key:
- New file internal/tui/roadmap.go: render function taking []tick.Tick -> string for the left pane: epics grouped into waves (from query.Roadmap), one line per epic with status glyph/color, [closed/total] progress, gate badge (awaiting type) — match the visual language of the existing tree rendering.
- model.go: add viewMode field (tree|roadmap), m keybinding to toggle, route View()/buildListContent() through the roadmap renderer when active, keep selection moving across epic lines so the right detail pane shows the selected epic. fsnotify reloads recompute the roadmap (recompute in buildItems path, no caching).
- Add m: roadmap to the help/keybinding hints wherever existing keys are listed.

Keep it minimal: no horizontal graph drawing, no new panes — waves as indented groups with arrows listing blocker ids, e.g. "← blocked by: abc". Tests: pure render function gets a unit test with a fixed tick set (golden-ish string assertions on key substrings); model keybinding covered if the existing model has test conventions, otherwise document manual verification (go run ./cmd/tk view or however the TUI launches — check cmd/tk/cmd/view.go) in your report.

Run: go test ./... && go build ./...
notes: 2026-06-10 15:36 - DONE_WITH_CONCERNS accepted: roadmap mode is display-only; j/k still drive the (hidden) tree selection. Candidate follow-up: roadmap-native selection. Explicitly allowed by the tick spec.
acceptance_criteria: go test ./... passes; m toggles a roadmap view rendering waves/status/progress/gates; selection + detail pane still work
closed_reason: TUI roadmap mode merged (m toggle, 9 render tests). Accepted concern: display-only v1 — selection stays on tree items; noted for retro as possible follow-up
